name: Basic electronics search
query: Search Amazon for CTS 500k guitar pots
expected_behavior: Uses Chrome DevTools MCP to navigate to Amazon
Takes snapshot and reads product data from the accessibility tree
Extracts ASINs paired with product names from the same container elements
Presents products with clean amazon.com/dp/[ASIN] URLs

name: ASIN extraction accuracy
expected_behavior: Extracts exactly 10-character ASINs
Never fabricates or hallucinates ASINs
Handles /dp/, /gp/product/, and amzn.to/ URL formats
Pairs ASINs with product names from the same container element
Provides clean amazon.com/dp/[ASIN] links

name: Error recovery
expected_behavior: Recognizes CAPTCHA in snapshot
Waits 60 seconds before retry
Informs user about rate limiting
Does not fabricate data to mask error

name: Domain explicit - skip the question
query: Search Amazon France for a Bluetooth speaker under 50€
expected_behavior: Detects 'Amazon France' and the € currency hint
Does NOT ask the user which Amazon domain to use
Uses amazon.fr for all search and product page URLs
Proceeds directly to requirements gathering (Step 1)
Output URLs use https://www.amazon.fr/dp/[ASIN] format

name: Domain ambiguous - must ask
query: Find me wireless headphones on Amazon
expected_behavior: Recognizes the request is ambiguous about marketplace
Uses AskUserQuestion to present the closed list of supported domains
Does NOT default silently to amazon.com
Waits for the answer before proceeding to requirements gathering
Once chosen, uses that domain consistently for all URLs
